text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to begin training with Mihono Bourbon.
She usually finishes getting ready well before
we're supposed to start, but today's different.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...One minute left until training begins. Thank you
for waiting, Trainer.
choice_data_list: It's rare to see you cut it so close.
It's rare to see you cut it so close.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes. You see—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: FOUND YA!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bourbon! Our discussion isn't over!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. However, it is already time for my
training to begin. I am thus unable to debate any
longer.
choice_data_list: Is there some kind of dispute?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's correct! The topic at hand is why she keeps
breaking our vending machines!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class representative, it is my responsibility to
prevent the destruction of school property!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Any machinery I come into contact with breaks
down without exception. The cause is unknown. It
is not done with intention.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I know you don't mean to break them! But there's
still room for discussion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O spreads her arms wide as if to
prevent Mihono Bourbon from running away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: To be fair, it is pretty weird to be able to break machines just by touching them. An investigation may be worthwhile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But for now, the issue at hand is that the vending
machines are out of service. Maybe we need some
kind of countermeasure.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Are you listening to me, Bourbon?! I want to hear
your trainer's thoughts on the issue too.
choice_data_list:
I guess it's not good that no one can use the
vending machines, right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh? Yes, you're right about that.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, Trainer. I recognize the situation is very
"inconvenient."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Vending machines are essential when one cannot
refill their water bottle or purchase a drink from
the store.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: But... I cannot use them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We can't let things continue like this. If I'm with
her, it's fine, but if I'm not...
choice_data_list:
Ask a friend to use the machine for you from
now on.

Try using some kind of tool to touch the
machine.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
A friend... I have determined that option to be
difficult.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
First, there are very few people that I can refer to
as friends.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Second, those few friends will not necessarily be
nearby when—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Then just call me over! No matter the time, no
matter the place, I'll Bakushin right to you in a
flash!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class representative, I can't abandon a student
in need! And besides, we're friends!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...We are?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course we are! Aren't you proud to have the
class representative as a friend?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Not particularly. But yes... we are friends...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I can imagine how thrilled you are about
that, but don't just stand there repeating it.
You're gonna make me blush.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Understood. I will call for you when I need to
use a vending machine, Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, just leave it to me, the perfect role model
for all students—the class representative, Sakura
Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...My friend.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: From then on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start to notice Mihono Bourbon near vending
machines at times, restlessly searching for her
friend, Sakura Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: A tool... perhaps something like tongs?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I see! You've got a good head on your shoulders!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You can use them to put your money in and all
that without actually touching the machine! Let's
go try it out later!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood. I will do as Trainer commands.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Mihono Bourbon tries using tongs to
operate a vending machine.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Uh, what's all this? Why're you using tongs,
Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Do you want to buy some juice or something? I'll
press the buttons for you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... You don't need those tongs, Bourbon. I'll
help you out—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah... sorry. I can't reach the top button... Can you
give me a boost?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Since then, people nearby always end up helping
me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Based on this experience, I have determined that
asking for help is more efficient than using tongs.
choice_data_list: Sounds like a plan to me!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Indeed.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Despite my lack of communication skills,
someone will help me if I ask.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I will be sure to record this in my memory logs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Mihono Bourbon has plenty of
friends willing to help her—she just hadn't
realized it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, she knows just how important it is to
rely on others.
